revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia25]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia25]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia25]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:mm]][[category:mm]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixed typo that made the subst not work
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Shinto Wiki]][[Category:qq]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

#redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Shinto Wiki]][[Category:11]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

#redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Shinto Wiki]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] <noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude> [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Shinto Wiki]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Shinto Wiki
revision.text:
#redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] <noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>
<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text:
#redirect[[en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] <noinclude></noinclude>
<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
revision.text:
redirect[[:en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] <noinclude></noinclude>
<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25263326738|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Shinto Wiki:WikiProject Fact and Reference Check]] <noinclude></noinclude>
